ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft that flew the flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route flown */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., commercial, private, military) */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot who flew the aircraft */,
  "co_pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-pilot */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance flown in the flight */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Amount of fuel consumed during the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., completed, delayed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_co_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the aircraft (e.g., operational, maintenance, grounded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "origin_airport" TEXT /* Origin airport */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* Destination airport */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route */,
  "estimated_fly_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to fly the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the data belongs to */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the aircraft */,
  "groundspeed" REAL /* Groundspeed of the aircraft */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch of the aircraft */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll of the aircraft */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the aircraft */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Fuel level at the time of the data point */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the data point */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., GPS, accelerometer) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the sensor data belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sensor data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_tags_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the event occurred during */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the flight data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the permission applies to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the configuration applies to */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the configuration applies to */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_configurations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft the configuration applies to */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_configurations_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the configuration applies to */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_configurations_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the plan applies to */,
  "plan" TEXT /* Plan details */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the flight plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flight plan was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
